data.description: JSON array of flat records; mutually exclusive with input_path

input_path.description: JSON or CSV file of records; mutually exclusive with data

x.description: Field for the x axis (or category/label field for pie); null only for histogram

y.description: Fields plotted as series (single field for pie/histogram)

title.description: Chart title; null derives from y field names

output_path.description: Where to write the chart artifact, project-relative
